operational_knowledge_units.title: Robot Selection supports add and remove actions by robot identifier or selection
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Robot Selection interface includes actions to add a robot by entering the corresponding robot ID and clicking Add, and to remove a robot by entering the corresponding robot ID or selecting the robot and clicking Remove. The system provides success feedback for add and removal actions.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robot Selection / Add and Remove'
Visible text: '1. Enter the corresponding robot ID'
Visible text: '3. The system will show that the adding was successful.'
Visible text: '1. Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot.'
Visible text: '3. The system will show that the removal'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot Selection Add and Remove UI. Add robot: enter corresponding robot ID, click Add, system shows adding was successful. Remove robot: enter corresponding robot ID or select the robot, click Remove, system shows removal feedback.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Add a robot from the Robot Selection screen
preconditions: Access to the Robot Selection screen
The corresponding robot ID is known
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Robot Selection / Add and Remove' with numbered steps for adding and removing robots in the Robot Selection interface.

steps.expected_outcome: The robot ID is populated in the Robot Selection interface.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the intended robot ID has been entered.
steps.visual_region_hint: Robot Selection screen area with robot ID entry field

steps.expected_outcome: The system processes the add request for the entered robot ID.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the Add action was triggered from the Robot Selection interface.
steps.visual_region_hint: Add button on the Robot Selection screen

steps.instruction: Verify that the system shows that the adding was successful.
steps.expected_outcome: A success indication is displayed for the add action.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the interface shows successful add feedback.
steps.visual_region_hint: System feedback or confirmation message area on the Robot Selection screen

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure to add robot in Robot Selection: enter corresponding robot ID, click Add, verify the system shows adding was successful.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Remove a robot from the Robot Selection screen
preconditions: Access to the Robot Selection screen
The target robot can be identified by robot ID or selected in the interface
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Robot Selection / Add and Remove' with numbered steps for adding and removing robots in the Robot Selection interface.

steps.instruction: Enter the corresponding robot ID or select the robot.
steps.expected_outcome: The target robot is identified in the Robot Selection interface.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the intended robot is selected or identified by the entered robot ID.
steps.visual_region_hint: Robot Selection screen area with robot list and/or robot ID field

steps.expected_outcome: The system processes the removal request for the selected or identified robot.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the Remove action was triggered from the Robot Selection interface.
steps.visual_region_hint: Remove button on the Robot Selection screen

steps.instruction: Verify that the system shows that the removal was successful.
steps.expected_outcome: A success indication is displayed for the removal action.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the interface shows successful removal feedback.
steps.visual_region_hint: System feedback or confirmation message area on the Robot Selection screen

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure to remove robot in Robot Selection: enter corresponding robot ID or select the robot, click Remove, verify the system shows removal was successful.
